label: single-profile c4 owner-override pilot (historical Block 0)
utc_time_reason: not recorded by the harness; not recoverable post-hoc
wall_clock_source: pilot report table; overlapping, not serial
skel_bytes_source: DERIVED, not recorded: extracted from run_pilot_wf.<lane>.js INPUTS[k].skeleton length. The real lane's per-key values (zaz 2046 + upama 3560) sum to 5606, which reproduces the harness's logged 'kill-timeout 180s @ skelBytes=5606' exactly — that agreement is the check that the extraction is sound.
preflight_cost_caveat: point estimate from a rate table whose currency was NOT verified this campaign
token_detail_reason: not recorded by the harness; not recoverable post-hoc
subagent_tokens_reason: 59,250 — SECOND-HAND: this figure appears in NO machine artifact. Neither wf_output carries any token field. Its only source is the pilot report's prose table. Carried for continuity, NOT independently verified.
promotion_eligible_reason: synthetic canary — NEVER promotable by policy
protocol_deviation: BLOCK 0 CAVEAT: this window overlapped a second in-flight call on the same c4 profile (recorded protocol deviation). NOT serial-throughput evidence.

label: single-profile c4 owner-override pilot (historical Block 0)
utc_time_reason: not recorded by the harness; not recoverable post-hoc
wall_clock_source: pilot report table; overlapping, not serial
skel_bytes_source: DERIVED, not recorded: extracted from run_pilot_wf.<lane>.js INPUTS[k].skeleton length. The real lane's per-key values (zaz 2046 + upama 3560) sum to 5606, which reproduces the harness's logged 'kill-timeout 180s @ skelBytes=5606' exactly — that agreement is the check that the extraction is sound.
preflight_cost_caveat: point estimate from a rate table whose currency was NOT verified this campaign
token_detail_reason: not recorded by the harness; not recoverable post-hoc
subagent_tokens_reason: null — the call ran to the 180 s kill ceiling and was abandoned. It certainly consumed tokens (an abandoned call keeps generating until its own cap, gen_opt_harness2.py:152-155), but the harness captured none. Reporting 0 here would be the 'missing telemetry passing as zero' defect this campaign censused (finding C-25, self-inflicted and corrected).
dropped_sanskrit_span_reason: no cards returned; nothing to measure
promotion_eligible_reason: 0 clean real rows vs an 80% floor
protocol_deviation: BLOCK 0 CAVEAT: this window overlapped a second in-flight call on the same c4 profile (recorded protocol deviation). NOT serial-throughput evidence.

label: pre-registered matrix cell 1 (tiny-A)
planned_shape: smallest eligible, raw <6 KiB, low sense/citation
not_run_reason: NOT RUN — zero live calls fired this campaign. Three independent reasons, each sufficient: (1) this session is not the c4 session (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR unset -> default profile); Workflow subagents inherit session credentials, so the brief's 'c4 only' is UNENFORCEABLE here and every call would be mis-attributed — the brief's own 'manifest provenance fails' hard stop. (2) Two of the brief's own hard stop conditions were already tripped by the pilot it told us to close first: a call exceeded the 180 s kill ceiling, and calls were launched concurrently by mistake. The brief directs: stop live calls, continue the offline audit. (3) Finding C-01: at the 180 s ceiling, 46-66% of the runnable nominal universe is undeliverable on ANY route, so most cells would have bought nulls, not data.
predicted_outcome_if_run: tiny strata (cells 1-2): SAFE..COIN-FLIP; typical (3-4): COIN-FLIP..DOOMED; upper-normal (5-6): DOOMED at the centre rate. PREDICTION from finding C-01, NOT a measurement.
keys_reason: no keys were selected; selection never ran
telemetry_reason: window not attempted; all telemetry null by construction, never zero
